holdings.infoBox: JPIN is an equity ETF with a total of 471 individual holdings. The top holdings are LG Innotek stock at 1.28%, SK hynix at 1.00%, Samsung Electronics at 0.69%, Tokyo Electron at 0.64%, and Lenovo Group at 0.56%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Diversified Return International Equity ETF (JPIN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of developed ex-North America securities that are selected based on value, momentum, and quality factors, then weighted by the inverse of historical volatility on a sector and regional level. JPIN was launched on Nov 7, 2014 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
infoTable: JPMorgan Diversified Factor International Equity Index
